scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n vite,electron "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx CUELY_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ./electron/main.mjs"
scripts.dev:native: concurrently -k -n vite,electron "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx CUELY_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 CUELY_DEFAULT_SOURCE=native electron ./electron/main.mjs"
